mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS purchaseId, p.quantity AS quantity, p.purchase_price AS purchasePrice, p.total_price AS totalPrice, u.gender AS gender, u.birth AS birth, COALESCE(c.name, '기타') AS categoryName FROM purchases p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN products pr ON p.product_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON pr.category_id = c.id WHERE TRUNC(p.created_at) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY p.created_at, p.id
